textByHash.481baeec74bad9f76206ee2ca080efe37125f224: Hullo. Interested in doing a little job for me?
textByHash.56f069114061c66848f678a621892d7161d96c2d: Did you get me item? I don't really have an awful lot of time anymore.
textByHash.5cd44a1b59cc38c8a732c5bcd8910c17f0b40a87: I'm really sorry to hear that, I thought you were just the human for the job.
textByHash.6b91ead5f0f435645744e7da7c38465954c6bd4c: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you prefer me to teach you a bit about how you can mine more efficiently?
textByHash.6cf44345b75bf4b9e9db4baebbe43d891af25c1a: For a very special customer, yes.
textByHash.76cf1c9797bfa5c72d5b9cbca26cd66ad3b80add: It's too late for that. What am I supposed to do with item now?
textByHash.8faf5a4fb1f408fa76f6552800febab803f1abd6: What can I interest you in? We have something of everything here!
textByHash.98cf91cb131c9c6ec4fe43c7fc6d312a50d1cdbf: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you prefer me to tell you about some crafting secrets?
textByHash.98d669f698952bea33791f87d05a140773c387bc: No need to be rude about it! Especially since you promised me!
textByHash.ac024d5c734461dcb3b375b28a3baa70bef083b4: Let's see now... Can you get me item in the next minutes?
textByHash.d761b08a3c679efc1c66f3960a3eccd2fa5cc4b0: , you didn't get me my item within the minutes I gave you. I'm disappointed.
textByHash.e0d2b3be151392b6000e67cbb37b0fd2b0512f97: You certainly are! Thank you very much!
textByHash.eeab4db5b31c673780aca5221a80d34bdf183c24: I've got a very specific task for you, for a very special customer. Can you get me item in the next minutes?
textByHash.f91c9fdf173e3389a2616ff163cd9707ec5cfa82: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you like me to show you some smithing tricks?
